title: astronium urundeuva
intro: Astronium urundeuva, also known as Brazil cockroach tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astronium urundeuva include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Astronium urundeuva can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine in Brazil and other parts of South America.
